info.title: Vulcx Stream API
info.description: Real-time swap quote stream over WebSocket. Subscribe to token pairs and receive a quote push whenever the price materially changes.

production.description: Production WebSocket server. Requires an API key as a `?key=` query parameter on the connection URL (e.g. `wss://api.vulcx.xyz/api/v1/stream?key=vulcx_...`) — browsers can't set custom headers on a WebSocket handshake, so this is the only way to authenticate. A missing or invalid key is rejected before the upgrade completes.

stream.description: Subscribe to live swap quotes for one or more token pairs. Send a `subscribe` message to start receiving quote pushes; send `unsubscribe` to stop. Supports up to 256 subscriptions per connection.

subscribe.name: Subscribe
subscribe.title: Subscribe
subscribe.summary: Subscribe to live quote updates for one or more token pairs.

unsubscribe.name: Unsubscribe
unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe
unsubscribe.summary: Stop receiving quote updates for one or more token pairs.

quotePush.name: QuotePush
quotePush.title: Quote push
quotePush.summary: Pushed by the server when a subscribed pair's price materially changes.

amount.description: The subscribed amount in smallest token units.

amountOut.description: Estimated output amount in smallest token units.

hops.description: Number of hops in the route. 1 = direct, 2+ = multi-hop.

slot.description: Fogo slot the quote was computed at.

quoteId.description: Firm-quote commitment ID for this exact quote. Pass it as quoteId to POST /swap or POST /instructions to replay the quoted route at the quoted price. Omitted when the quote can't be pinned.

validForMs.description: How long quoteId stays redeemable, in milliseconds.

firmForMs.description: How long quoteId stays redeemable with firm: true (price-or-fail), in milliseconds.

quoteSignature.description: Base58 Ed25519 signature over the canonical vulcx-quote-v1 message (present when quote signing is enabled). Key at GET /.well-known/vulcx-quote-signer.

quoteExpiresAtMs.description: Absolute expiry (unix ms) embedded in the signed message.

ack.name: Ack
ack.title: Acknowledgement
ack.summary: Server acknowledgement for subscribe/unsubscribe, or an error response.

count.description: Number of pairs accepted. Invalid or duplicate pairs are skipped and not counted.

message.description: Error description. Present only when `type` is `error`.

invalidatePush.name: InvalidatePush
invalidatePush.title: Invalidate push
invalidatePush.summary: The last quote pushed for a pair drifted past the firm margin — its quoteId is no longer firm-redeemable.

quoteId.description: The commitment ID that drifted stale. Best-effort: the redemption-time check on the server is the real gate.

subscribeRoute.name: SubscribeRoute
subscribeRoute.title: Subscribe route templates
subscribeRoute.summary: Stream ready-to-fire CPI route templates for a pair; pushed only when the template actually changes.

routes.description: Route-template subscriptions (max 32 per connection — each costs a full route build per recompute).

unsubscribeRoute.name: UnsubscribeRoute
unsubscribeRoute.title: Unsubscribe route templates
unsubscribeRoute.summary: Stop streaming route templates for the given subscriptions (must match the subscribe fields).

routePush.name: RoutePush
routePush.title: Route template push
routePush.summary: A CPI route template changed (route plan, account list, or LUTs — amount ticks alone never push).

seq.description: Increments by 1 per template change for this subscription; a gap means a missed push — resubscribe.

slot.description: Slot the template was computed at.

route.description: Same payload as POST /cpi/route-accounts: routeInstruction (accounts + data), requiredTokenAccounts, referrerAta, addressLookupTableAddresses, amounts. Amounts are as-of the last template change, not tick-fresh — re-quote (or redeem a firm quoteId) for the current price.

sendMessages.summary: Subscribe or unsubscribe to pair quote streams

ApiKeyQuery.name: key
ApiKeyQuery.description: API key as a `?key=vulcx_...` query parameter. Required — this is the only auth option for the WebSocket stream, since browsers can't set custom headers on a WS handshake.

PairRequest.description: A token pair subscription. The subscription key is the full (in, out, amount, exactIn) tuple — two entries differing only in amount are distinct streams.

in.description: Input token mint address (base58-encoded public key).

out.description: Output token mint address (base58-encoded public key).

amount.description: Amount in smallest token units, as a string. For FOGO (9 decimals): 1000000000 = 1 FOGO.

exactIn.description: `true` quotes `amount` as the exact input (ExactIn). `false` treats it as the exact desired output (ExactOut).

authority.description: Calling program's PDA authority (base58) — same as POST /cpi/route-accounts.

amount.description: Amount in smallest token units (decimal string).

allowedIntermediateMints.description: Route corridor — multi-hop routes may only pass through these mints.

maxHops.description: Cap on route length (1 = direct only).
